steps.title: Lookup the relevant counts from the table
steps.content: From the table, the number of states with a state-level sales tax and no state-level income tax is 6 (row No state income tax, column State sales tax). The total number of states with a state-level sales tax is 45 (sum of column State sales tax: 39 + 6).

steps.title: Calculate the percentage and match the answer
steps.content: Divide the 6 states with sales tax but no income tax by the 45 states with any sales tax: 6 / 45 = 0.1333...; multiply by 100 gives 13.33...%, which rounds to 13.3% to the nearest tenth of a percent. That confirms C is correct.
